subject: fix(review): address code review findings across screens, hooks, and components
body:
Fixes and improvements from the review trigger sweep:

- PriceHistoryChart: Remove selectedFuelType from effect deps to prevent
  unnecessary re-runs; add accessible data summary for screen readers
- TutorialModal: Fix step 4 wording to match current bottom sheet UI
- UpdatePrompt: Add loading state and visual feedback on update button
- StationList: Fix empty state title color (chipText to text), change sort
  toggle from tab/tablist to radio/radiogroup for correct semantics
- useLocation: Add 15s GPS timeout via Promise.race to prevent indefinite
  hangs on poor signal
- useStations: Add fuel_type_id deduplication in groupByStation to prevent
  duplicate price rows from showing
- bulk-import: Add 5 MB file size check before reading uploaded JSON
- FuelMapWeb: Add role=region + aria-label to map container; add
  aria-label + role=img to user location blue dot marker
- Home screen: Add Filters hint button when filters are auto-hidden
  on scroll, so users can rediscover them

Tags: review, bugfix, accessibility, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

title: address code review findings across screens, hooks, and components
